timing: Recorded after the common feasibility screen and before any E08 full-population promotion decision.

observed_blockers.qwen3.5-122b-a10b: ten-row run exceeded 532 seconds without a sealed artifact

fallback_rationale: This route was already used as the frozen reference generator in E05-E07 and passed the same 40-row gate with zero failures. It prevents operational availability from making E08 and downstream prompt experiments impossible.
bias_control: The original registered routes, their failed screens, comparisons and incident records are retained. The registry is not rewritten retroactively. Claims are scoped to observed gateway routes, not intrinsic model rankings.
